'''Arvid Scraf''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]]. He may have been of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] or [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] descent and was six or seven years younger than [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. While in the wastelands of Nam Chorios, he found and took Luke back with him to [[Ruby Gulch]] to meet his Aunt [[Gin Scraf]]. He later participated on an attack on one of the [[Theran]]s gun stations so [[Dzym]] could be allowed to leave Nam Chorios, though to him and the other [[Newcomer]]s, they merely believed that they were opening up the world to free trade.
